sample_rows.abstract: The photoelectric punched card reader uses a sprocket wheel drive from a stepping motor for card transport. The stepping motor (1) is mounted on a fixed back plate and carries a gear wheel (7) that meshes with a pinion (8) on a shaft carrying the drive sprocket (16). Other gears (9,10) drive a mechanical counter (9) that records the number of information tracks that have been passed. A limit switch (14) located at the side is actuated when the card is inserted when the reset (12) button or the counter is operated the motor is energised. A control circuit directs the operating cycle of the reader.
sample_rows.title: Photoelectric programme card reader - has stepping motor drive connected to sprocket wheel engaging transport holes in card
Film cassette for a photographic camera

sample_rows.abstract: Systems and methods for reducing noise from an input signal are provided. An input signal is received. The input signal is transformed from a time domain to a plurality of subbands in a frequency domain, where each subband of the plurality of subbands includes a speech component and a noise component. For each of the subbands, an amplitude of the speech component is estimated based on an amplitude of the subband and an estimate of at least one signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of the subband. The estimating of the amplitude of the speech component is based on a closed-form solution. The plurality of subbands in the frequency domain are filtered based on the amplitudes of the speech components.
sample_rows.title: Systems and methods for suppressing noise in an audio signal for subbands in a frequency domain based on a closed-form solution

sample_rows.abstract: The use of ceramic meshes is offered for spacing catalyst meshes apart from one another in the production of HCN, especially by the Andrussov process.
sample_rows.title: Catalyst assembly comprising catalyst meshes and ceramic meshes

sample_rows.abstract: The present invention even when a force is weak reliably provide a golf tee that can be pierced vertically to the ground.    And A tee main body 2 and four ball support portion 3 having a post portion, a golf tee 1 comprises a stepped portion for a pair of guides.  The pair of shaped guide step portion is formed as a quadrangle, a side step portion 6 after provided on one side of which, a short distance from the ball support unit 3 from the front step part 7 of the opposite side to the leg portion 4 distal direction in is formed, and a rear pillar portion 8,8A is protruded to the same height from the corner angle of the rear step portion 6 of the ball support portion 3 provided with the four struts, the front step part 7 of a front strut 9,9A having the same projecting height from the corner angle is provided to protrude as post shape.  The axis D to be higher the rear strut 8,8A side is 1~8mm in the vertical direction.    .The
sample_rows.title: Golf tee
